message:
fix(robot): simplify THINKING agent relaxation check

The previous check was overly specific, matching on a particular
exclude reason string. Now simply checks if an agent is in THINKING
state and was excluded for any reason, which is more robust and
correctly captures the intent of including nearly-ready agents.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
